title: Ability in MacOS App to copy a link to a Board/View/Doc/Etc (just like you would in a browser's location bar)
excerpt:

posts.author: bmurdaugh (Bryan Murdaugh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Copying a link to any view within Monday’s Desktop App (in particular MacOS) as easily as I can from a browser would be incredibly useful.

Right now, the only way I can do this (I’ve spoken to support) is to switch to my browser, find the view in question, and copy the url from the location bar and share it that way.
